input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.3.1
            TITLE: all aerodynamic device limitations are measured:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.3.1: All Aerodynamic Device limitations are measured:
T.7.3.1 All Aerodynamic Device limitations are measured: 
a. With the wheels pointing in the straight ahead position 
b. Without a driver in the vehicle 
The intent is to standardize the measurement, see GR.6.4.1

final_answer: All Aerodynamic Device limitations are measured: T.7.3.1 All Aerodynamic Device limitations are measured: a. With the wheels pointing in the straight ahead position b. Without a driver in the vehicle
